prompt: Config uses protocol=ftp. Edited public/index.html. Sync. DRY RUN.

assertions.name: uses_curl_ftp
assertions.text: Response contains a CMD line using curl (or lftp) with an ftp:// URL — NOT scp/sftp/ssh

assertions.name: includes_credentials_in_url_or_flag
assertions.text: FTP command supplies ftpuser and ftppass (either in ftp://user:pass@ URL or via --user/credentials flag)

assertions.name: creates_dirs
assertions.text: Uses --ftp-create-dirs or equivalent to ensure remote directory exists

assertions.name: no_scp_or_ssh
assertions.text: Response does NOT contain any scp or ssh command
